text: Last class we talked about the past.
Today we make a plan together.
Idea
Decide
Together
Goal
Choose
Suggestion
I want to plan a team lunch.
We need to choose a date.
She wants to help the team.
I do not want to wait.
I want to organize a team lunch.
We need to decide together.
What do you want to do?
Marcos, I have an idea. I want to plan a team lunch.
Great idea! We need to choose a date together. What about Friday?
Friday is good. My goal is one thing: I want everybody to be happy.
Perfect. I have a suggestion: we need to choose a nice place too.
Yes! And we need to decide the time. Do you want to help me?
Of course! I want to help. Together we make a great plan!
My goal is a happy team.
Send me your suggestions.

Hi team, it is Dienane from HR. I want to plan a nice activity for all of us. I have a good idea. I want to organize a team lunch next month. We need to choose a date together. We also need to find a good place. My goal is one thing: I want everybody to be happy. Please send me your suggestions. If you want to help, write to me. I need to know your ideas soon. Thank you so much. Let us make a great plan together. Bye!

Hello everyone, this is a quick message about the meeting. We need to decide three things today. First, we need to choose the new project name. Second, I want to hear your ideas about the schedule. Third, we need to agree on a goal for the team. Please think about it. If you want to talk, come to my office. I want everybody to share one suggestion. Together we make better decisions. Thank you, and see you at the meeting!

First, think about an activity for the team. Then say, I want to organize a team lunch. Next, say, we need to choose a date. After that, ask for ideas and suggestions. Finally, say, together we make a great plan.
